results.title: Employee Quits on WhatsApp After Manager Rejects Anxiety Leave, Chat Sparks Huge Workplace Debate
results.description: An employee resigned via WhatsApp after his manager rejected an anxiety leave request. The exchange has sparked a heated debate on workplace empathy and professionalism.
